subcodes.title: Words to a musician, spoken on 1913-05-08
subcodes.first_line: Music was an ancient art in Persia. The old people of Persia loved music very much and their artists contributed to its development. When the Arabs conquered Persia
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @past, present and future of Iran, @stories; anecdotes, @music and singing, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
